items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a persona scenario involving the copying of settings between businesses. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete results or outcomes from this simulation, nor does it confirm whether the expected result was achieved. The lack of specific traces or snapshots to audit the coverage further contributes to the inconclusiveness of this validation.
